description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in teal from kiara. Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 28 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 12 cm Made of leatherette for durability Quilted with heart and flower pattern for high-fashion style Has two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pockets Two handles attached to the bag, alternate long strap provided One zippered pocket on front One zipped at the back for additional space Two zipped pockets on sides Metal stud feet on base Round metal zip pulls for style and ease of use Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
